mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reward_mails (user_id, sender_id, sender_name, title, message, reward_type, coin_amount, coupon_type, coupon_name, discount_rate, threshold_amount, reduce_amount, coupon_quantity, expires_at, status, viewed_at, claimed_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{title}, #{message}, #{rewardType}, #{coinAmount}, #{couponType}, #{couponName}, #{discountRate}, #{thresholdAmount}, #{reduceAmount}, #{couponQuantity}, #{expiresAt}, #{status}, #{viewedAt}, #{claimedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM reward_mails ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT * FROM reward_mails WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM reward_mails WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status IN ('UNREAD', 'VIEWED') AND (expires_at IS NULL OR expires_at > CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reward_mails WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
mapper.update: UPDATE reward_mails SET status = 'VIEWED', viewed_at = COALESCE(viewed_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'UNREAD'
UPDATE reward_mails SET status = 'CLAIMED', claimed_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND status IN ('UNREAD', 'VIEWED')
